title: campium boivinii
intro: Campium boivinii, also known as Boivin's Campium or Campium boivinii, is a type of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Campium boivinii plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
